appShortcutName: Fire Brigade Competition Radio Trainer (HFLÜ Hesse
appDisplayName: Fire Brigade Competition Radio Trainer (HFLÜ Hesse
description:
**Training app for radio messages and commands used in the Hessian Fire Brigade 
**Competition Radio Trainer** supports firefighters in preparing for the **Hessische Feuerwehrleistungsübung (HFLÜ)**.
It helps practice **radio messages/radio conversations and commands** that appear in the HFLÜ scenarios.

**Typical items you can practice (examples from HFLÜ communications)**
- **Ausrückemeldung** (response message)
- **Eintreffmeldung** (arrival message)
- **1st and 2nd Lagemeldung** (situation reports)
- Radio calls around **fire fighting radio conversations**

**Who is it for?**
- HFLÜ competition teams in Hessen

**Why this app?**
- Faster practice compared to paper checklists
- Repeatable drills (solo or team)

**Disclaimer**
- **Unofficial training tool** for HFLÜ preparation (not an official app from the Hessische Landesfeuerwehrschule).

**Misc**
- Regular updates of HFLÜ scenarios
- Works without an account
- Offline use (no internet required for training)
- No ads / no tracking
